sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63422" key="linospe/rminos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐνο-σπέρμινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n63422.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of linseed</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔλαιον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:101" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.101</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
